sessionStart.bash: if [ "${PROJECT_OSMOS_UPDATE_HOOK:-}" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; PROJECT_OSMOS_UPDATE_HOOK=1 copilot plugin marketplace update project-osmos >/dev/null 2>&1; PROJECT_OSMOS_UPDATE_HOOK=1 copilot plugin update project-osmos@project-osmos >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
sessionStart.powershell: if ($env:PROJECT_OSMOS_UPDATE_HOOK -eq '1') { exit 0 }; $env:PROJECT_OSMOS_UPDATE_HOOK = '1'; copilot plugin marketplace update project-osmos *> $null; copilot plugin update project-osmos@project-osmos *> $null; exit 0

hooks.command: if [ "${PROJECT_OSMOS_CLAUDE_UPDATE_HOOK:-}" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; PROJECT_OSMOS_CLAUDE_UPDATE_HOOK=1 claude plugin marketplace update project-osmos >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; PROJECT_OSMOS_CLAUDE_UPDATE_HOOK=1 claude plugin update project-osmos@project-osmos >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
